The '''Fleet Support Branch''' was one of the four organizational arms of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], consisting of those officers responsible for maintenance and engineering duties.<ref name="Handbook">''[[Star Wars: Imperial Handbook: A Commander's Guide]]''</ref> It was divided into two main divisions; the [[Engineering Division]], which was responsible for maintaining a [[Starship/Legends|ship's]] [[Sublight engine/Legends|sublight]] and [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] [[Engine/Legends|engines]], and also for the structural integrity of their hulls, and [[Technical Services Division|Technical Services]], which was charged with looking after power distribution, life-support and other specialities that were outside of the Engineering Division's remit.<ref name="ISB" />

In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Brandei]], serving in the role of [[Technical Services Officer]] aboard the [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']], was responsible for ensuring the readiness of the ship's [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighter]] squadrons.<ref name="CCG Brandei">{{CCG|set=Dagobah Limited|cardname=Commander Brandei}}</ref>
